summary: Completed testing of Review feature (Calificar servicio). All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working correctly - past bookings show 'Calificar servicio' button or 'Ya calificaste este servicio' text, review modal works, and reviews appear on business profile.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - User login works - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/bookings/my?upcoming=false returns has_review field - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/reviews/business/{business_id} returns reviews with user_name and rating - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/reviews/ with invalid booking returns 400 - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/reviews/ creates review for past confirmed booking - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/reviews/ prevents duplicate reviews (400) - PASSED
Backend: has_review field is true after review creation - PASSED
Backend: Review appears in GET /api/reviews/business/{business_id} - PASSED
Frontend: Login flow works correctly - PASSED
Frontend: UserBookingsPage loads with Próximas/Pasadas tabs - PASSED
Frontend: Pasadas tab shows past booking with 'Ya calificaste este servicio' - PASSED
Frontend: BusinessProfilePage shows Reseñas tab with reviews - PASSED
Frontend: Reviews display user_name, rating (stars), comment, and timestamp - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Review feature implementation is complete and working correctly
POST /api/reviews/ endpoint validates: booking exists, belongs to user, is past/completed, not already reviewed
GET /api/bookings/my?upcoming=false correctly includes has_review field by checking reviews collection
GET /api/reviews/business/{business_id} returns reviews with user_name and user_photo populated
Frontend UserBookingsPage correctly shows 'Calificar servicio' button for unreviewed past bookings and 'Ya calificaste este servicio' for reviewed ones
Frontend review modal has 5 star buttons with hover effects and optional textarea for comment
BusinessProfilePage Reseñas tab shows rating distribution chart and individual reviews with stars
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user 'reviewtest@bookvia.com' with 1 past confirmed booking. Review was created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Review feature is fully implemented and tested. Key points: (1) POST /api/reviews/ creates review with trailing slash, (2) GET /api/bookings/my?upcoming=false includes has_review field, (3) GET /api/reviews/business/{business_id} returns reviews with user_name, (4) Frontend shows 'Calificar servicio' button on past confirmed bookings without review, (5) After review, button changes to 'Ya calificaste este servicio', (6) BusinessProfilePage Reseñas tab shows all reviews with stars and comments.
